title: draba supranivalis
intro: Draba supranivalis, also known as Arctic whitlowgrass, is a small, annual plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Draba supranivalis are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or salves, which are applied topically to alleviate various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
